description_long: This is a modern bungalow with a flat green roof, large glass windows, and a clean, rectangular layout. The front facade features expansive windows and a covered entryway, while the sides are bordered by manicured hedges and small trees. The rear of the bungalow includes a private garden area and additional glass doors, suggesting access to outdoor living spaces. The structure is primarily white with green accents from the roof and surrounding landscaping. The building sits on a neatly defined plot with a paved perimeter and lush grass. The overall design emphasizes openness, natural light, and integration with the surrounding greenery.
description: A modern, flat-roofed bungalow with large glass windows, white walls, and green landscaping. The design is open and emphasizes natural light and outdoor integration.
description_view_0: Front view showing large windows, a covered entry, and manicured hedges.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the flat green roof, side garden, and a smaller window arrangement.
description_view_2: Rear view with private garden, glass doors, and more greenery.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing additional windows, green roof, and dense shrubbery.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large front-facing windows and grouped side windows
